content:
# Business Checking Referral Programs

## Eligible Account Offers
Use these offers only for referrals tied to business_checking accounts at Northstar Bank. Match the referred business to the account opened; do not substitute a similar personal checking offer. See "Personal Checking Referral Programs" when the referred customer is opening a consumer account.

| Account | Referrer bonus | Referred bonus | Minimum referred deposit | Referrer tenure | Annual cap |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Navy Blue Account | 100 | 50 | 5000 | 30 days | 12 |
| Cobalt Blue Account | 150 | 75 | 10000 | 60 days | 12 |
| Hunter Green Account | 175 | 100 | 15000 | 60 days | 10 |
| World Blue Account | 300 | 150 | 25000 | 90 days | 8 |
| Sky Blue Account | 400 | 120 | 10000 | 90 days | 5 |

## Eligibility Checks
1. Confirm the referrer has held the referring relationship for at least the listed tenure for the account receiving the referral credit.
2. Confirm the referred business will meet the listed minimum referred deposit for the account opened.
3. For Sky Blue Account only, the referred business must be no older than 4 years.
4. Apply the annual cap for the account type before quoting the bonus as available.

## Handling Notes
If the account choice is still uncertain, compare the deposit requirement, tenure requirement, and annual cap before quoting a reward. For general cap and eligibility interpretation across referral programs, see "Referral Limits And Eligibility".
title: Business Checking Referral Programs
